playbook.intent: 10-min async ritual to blockers surfaced, day's deliverables confirmed, founder unblocked from being the bottleneck.
playbook.scope: Founder runs a 10-minute async standup with 1-3 contractors. Output: blockers surfaced, day's deliverables confirmed, founder unblocked from being the bottleneck. Exit artifact: standup thread with each contractor's update + founder responses by mid-morning.

success-criteria.criterion: Every blocker has founder response within 4h
Day's deliverables are written and confirmed
No more than 10 min of founder time spent

stage.name: Each contractor posts update
stage.decision-gate: Advance when every contractor has posted.

stage.name: Founder reads + unblocks
stage.intent: Resolve every blocker in writing, fast.

tasks.task: Respond to each blocker with decision / action

stage.decision-gate: No blocker exits unanswered for more than 4h.

stage.name: Close the standup
stage.intent: Reaffirm the day's deliverables; tag anything that slips.
stage.decision-gate: Required: every contractor's day ends with explicit deliverables OR slip note.

extra.value: [Long synchronous status meetings - async only, Sprint planning rituals - separate cadence]
[Shared Slack / Discord channel with contractors, Standup template pinned]
[Letting standup become a discussion - back to sync meetings, Skipping the blocker response - kills async culture, Posting your own updates as if you are the doer instead of the unblocker]
['Did I unblock every blocker, or just acknowledge them?', 'Are deliverables specific enough to verify tonight?', 'Did this take 10 min or less of my time?']
{human: faion get-content daily-contractor-standup --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-contractor-standup --format context, json: faion get-content daily-contractor-standup --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
